channel.title: npj Comput. Mater.
channel.description: Filtered papers from npj Comput. Mater.

item.title: Machine learning pipeline for denoising low signal-to-noise ratio and out-of-distribution transmission electron microscopy datasets
item.description:
npj Computational Materials, Published online: 27 June 2026; doi:10.1038/s41524-026-02193-9

Machine learning pipeline for denoising low signal-to-noise ratio and out-of-distribution transmission electron microscopy datasets
